emails.subject: Dabhol
emails.body: Dabhol Steve, please look at the link below. Jeff wants to know if we should get in touch with this group to explain our side. Thanks, SRS <URL>

emails.subject: Dabhol
emails.body: I agree with John's recommendations. We have been doing surprisingly well in the press. And, for the most part, those who write bad stuff are doing so based on ideology we are not going to convert them. Forwarded by Steven J Kean/NA/Enron on 02/20/2001 10:22 AM John Ambler@ENRON_DEVELOPMENT 02/20/2001 12:08 AM
